title: Vegan Eggplant Casserole
description: A hearty, flavorful casserole perfect for a weeknight dinner, made with eggplant and a variety of spices.
instructions: Cut the eggplant into 1/2-inch thick slices and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced eggplant and cook until tender, about 5 minutes per side.
In a separate skillet, cook the sweet potato in a little water until tender.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked eggplant, sweet potato, and oats.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with the casserole package.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the casserole is golden brown and the topping is crispy.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
